jsonLd.title: Goibibo is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Goibibo family as a E-commerce Executive in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Goibibo:
Goibibo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goibibo!
